description_long: This rifle features a robust metal receiver and barrel assembly, complemented by a wooden stock and foregrip that display a slightly worn, wrapped appearance, suggesting field use or makeshift reinforcement. The stock is thick and solid, with visible cloth or leather wrappings for added grip and comfort. The magazine is positioned in front of the trigger guard, appearing as a box-type, and the trigger and trigger guard are clearly defined. The barrel is long and straight, with no visible muzzle device attached at the end. Iron sights are present atop the receiver, providing basic aiming capability. The overall finish is matte, with a mix of dark metal and brown wood tones, giving the rifle a utilitarian, rugged look suitable for urban environments.
description: A rugged rifle with a metal receiver and barrel, wooden stock and foregrip, and visible iron sights. The stock is wrapped for grip, and the finish is matte with dark metal and brown wood tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wrapped wooden stock, metal receiver, and barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, foregrip, and the box magazine in front of the trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the straight alignment of the barrel and receiver.
